/usr/lib64/ccache/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/eagleemu.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/eagleemu.dir/8255.c.o CMakeFiles/eagleemu.dir/cpu.c.o CMakeFiles/eagleemu.dir/gfx.c.o CMakeFiles/eagleemu.dir/keyb.c.o CMakeFiles/eagleemu.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/eagleemu.dir/saa1099_ext.c.o CMakeFiles/eagleemu.dir/sd.c.o CMakeFiles/eagleemu.dir/serial.c.o -o eagleemu  -lSDL2 -lSDL2_ttf -lSDL2 -lSDL2_mixer -lSDL2 -lm -lSAASound -lncurses -lSDL2_ttf -lSDL2_mixer -lm -lSAASound -lncurses
